---
title: 'If I were running for office: Introduction to the US Constitution Judicial Branch'
date: '2016-05-29T07:10:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe for Office'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '8081450980713172568'
blogger_filename: '/2016/05/if-i-were-running-for-office_29.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe for Office/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Compassion'
  - 'Foundations'
  - 'History'
  - 'Liberty'
  - 'Reason'
---

<br />
<h2>
If I were running for office: Introduction to the US Constitution Judicial Branch</h2>
<h3>
Republicans are off track and Democrats are heading the wrong direction.</h3>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
What was the purpose of the founding document (The Constitution)? Prevention of Tyranny to preserve Liberty.</h4>
<br />
The&nbsp;<a href="http://www.archives.gov/exhibits/charters/constitution_transcript.html" target="_blank">Constitution&nbsp;</a>(<a href="http://www.archives.gov/exhibits/charters/constitution_transcript.html" target="_blank">transcript here</a>)&nbsp;of the United States of America was designed to prevent the abuse of power seen in every other form of government in the history of man. The reason for the checks and balances put into the Constitution (<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/United_States_Constitution" target="_blank">history here</a>) was to purposefully limit the power of the Federal Government, which was always intended to be small.<br />
<br />
<h4>
What was the purpose of the three separate branches? Prevention of Tyranny to preserve Liberty.</h4>
<b>Judicial&nbsp;Branch</b><br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>All legislative Powers herein granted shall be vested in a Congress of the United States, which shall consist of a Senate and House of Representatives.</i></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>The judicial Power of the United States, shall be vested in one supreme Court, and in such inferior Courts as the Congress may from time to time ordain and establish. The Judges, both of the supreme and inferior Courts, shall hold their Offices during good Behaviour, and shall, at stated Times, receive for their Services, a Compensation, which shall not be diminished during their Continuance in Office.</i></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>The judicial Power shall extend to all Cases, in Law and Equity, arising under this Constitution, the Laws of the United States, and Treaties made, or which shall be made, under their Authority;—to all Cases affecting Ambassadors, other public Ministers and Consuls;—to all Cases of admiralty and maritime Jurisdiction;—to Controversies to which the United States shall be a Party;—to Controversies between two or more States;— between a State and Citizens of another State,—between Citizens of different States,—between Citizens of the same State claiming Lands under Grants of different States, and between a State, or the Citizens thereof, and foreign States, Citizens or Subjects.</i></blockquote>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Articles I intend to write (or have written):<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>If I were running for office: Liberty, Free Will, Choice, and the NAP</li>
<li>If I were running for office: Immigration - A Secure Nation Of Immigrants</li>
<li>If I were running for office: Education - Learning to Learn vs Learning to Test</li>
<li>If I were running for office: Economy - Unions, Corporations, and Free Markets</li>
<li>If I were running for office: Religion - Religious Freedom vs State Religion</li>
<li>If I were running for office: Rightful Place - Governments, Free Markets and Non Profits</li>
<li>If I were running for office: Abortion and NAP</li>
<li>If I were running for office: TBD</li>
<li>If I were running for office:&nbsp;TBD</li>
<li>If I were running for office:&nbsp;TBD</li>
<li>If I were running for office:&nbsp;TBD</li>
</ul>
<br />
<b><br /></b>
<b>Darrell Wolfe</b><br />
<b>Story Teller | INFJ | Intellection | Learner | Ideation | Achiever | Input | Multipotentialite</b><br />
<div>
<br /></div>
